issue_title: [Bug]: Components registered with `-` in their names dont work
issue_body_preview:
### What happened?

For some reason if you try to use components with the component registry that have hyphens in the name (i.e. `test-comp`) they refuse to render. but if you remove the hyphen it works fine

### Package

studiocms

### Version

0.1.0-beta.31

### What browsers are you seeing the pr
test_description_zh: 在 StudioCMS 中注册一个名称包含连字符（例如 `test-comp`）的自定义组件，然后在页面内容中使用该组件标签，访问包含该组件的页面，观察组件是否正常渲染。
expected_result_zh: 名称中包含连字符的注册组件应正常渲染并显示在页面上，与不含连字符的组件行为一致。
